title: [MTR4] KTRC Generic Stock
description: A Series of Generic Trains made by KTRC for MTR
body:
A Series of Generic Trains made for Minecraft Transit Railway by Kítòn Train and Railcar Construction.

P: Subtera, Rapid Transit

Q: Interalm, Light Rail

R: Autolines, Automatrf People Mover

U: Universal Locomotive, Locomotive

C: Regotrain, Commuter Rail

Il: Interlink, Intercity Rail

N: N-Type, Coaches

Anyone is free to Modify and Redistribute the Pack, as long as they link back to the Original pack.
